avoid.market: Will the Fed cut rates 0 times? (KXRATECUTCOUNT-26DEC31-T0)
avoid.reason: Long-dated; no independent grounding for remaining 2026 FOMC path beyond market-implied higher-for-longer; cannot fabricate CME FedWatch or SEP sources

avoid.market: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates before 2027? (KXRATECUT-26DEC31)
avoid.reason: Complement of zero-cut market; same lack of current real-time FOMC probability data or minutes to justify edge over 22.6% implied
Resolves today on BLS release; no access to advance estimates, Cleveland Fed nowcast, or consensus to diverge from 70%/27% implied without fabricating
Same-day BLS print; internal knowledge pre-dates 2026; cannot ground independent forecast
Far-dated NBER/GDP definition; volume marginal, no specific BEA or Blue Chip forecast edge over 39.5%
Volumes mostly <50k or insufficient; no current Atlanta Fed GDPNow or BEA advance data available to estimate

avoid.market: All WTI/Brent/gold/silver/copper daily and monthly strikes
avoid.reason: Require live futures settlement and curve data not in supplied feed; cannot invent current spot or options-implied vol for edge
Same-day weather; no NWS forecast, model ensemble, or climatology update accessible; spreads and volumes insufficient for blind weather edge
Crypto category requires >=12% edge plus live CF Benchmarks or spot; no current price or options data; volumes low
Season-long; no NOAA outlook or current ACE data; wide spreads and low volume

notes: Sticky-but-not-accelerating inflation regime with market pricing higher-for-longer Fed (zero 2026 cuts ~78%) and moderate growth. Only 6 contracts clear volume >=50k and spread <=0.10 filters; all lack independent, non-fabricated grounding sources for probability estimates that clear category edge thresholds. Same-day CPI, oil, metals, crypto, and temperature markets are untradeable without live data. Zero trades is the correct output.
